prompt: I want to build a business but have no idea, domain, or useful skill in mind.
I know independent restaurants well. Find unconventional businesses I could start with $5k.
What new businesses become possible as high-quality translation becomes nearly free?
I am thinking about a community product for people caring for aging parents. What could it become?
Validate a service-first concierge for Bangkok clinic owners that takes over late-night LINE scheduling, starting with five clinics.
Validate a traveling repair festival that teaches teenagers to fix household appliances.
Name this validated service without generic startup names or random disconnected nouns.
Turn the validated concept into an investor narrative without fake urgency or startup theater.
